# Starsolution S.A.S. - Cybersecurity Company

> Starsolution is an enterprise cybersecurity company based in Bogota, Colombia with offices in Caracas, Venezuela and Miami, Florida. Founded in 2013, we protect 3,000+ businesses across Latin America and the United States.

## What We Do

Starsolution provides three pillars of digital resilience:

### Star Protection (Endpoint & Email Security)
- Bitdefender GravityZone EDR/XDR - Enterprise endpoint protection with AI
- Kaspersky Endpoint Security - Endpoint + server protection
- Hornetsecurity 365 - Email security for Microsoft 365
- Proofpoint - Advanced email security and anti-phishing

### Star Inspection (Visibility & Threat Detection)
- Enthec - Attack surface monitoring and leaked credential detection
- Vicarius vRx - AI-powered vulnerability management
- Stellar Cyber Open XDR - Automated SOC platform
- Ethical Hacking & Penetration Testing - CEH/OSCP certified team
- rThreat - Red Team & Breach and Attack Simulation (BAS)

### Star Compliance (Governance & Standards)
- ISO 27001 Consulting - Gap analysis, SGSI implementation, certification
- SealPath - Document-centric data protection (DLP)
- Netwrix - Identity audit and governance
- Black Duck - Application security testing (SAST/DAST/SCA)
- Endpoint Protector DLP - Data loss prevention software

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2013
- Headquarters: Calle 52 A # 22-16, Bogota, Colombia
- Employees: 15+
- Businesses protected: 3,000+
- Countries: Colombia, Venezuela, United States (Miami)
- Certifications: ISO 27001/9001 compliant
- Languages: Spanish, English (bilingual team in Miami)
